title: T'ur
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''T'ur''''' was the designation for a group of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. These shuttles participated in the [[Defense of the Anvil|evacuation]] of personnel from the crippled and foundering [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]'', taking them to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
